channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: CDC Monitors U.S. Passengers After Rare Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
item.description:
Health officials are on high alert as American cruise passengers return home for monitoring after a rare Andes virus hantavirus exposure was confirmed aboard a passenger vessel.

Key points:
• The outbreak occurred aboard the MV Hondius, a Dutch cruise ship that departed Ushuaia, Argentina on April 1, carrying 147 passengers and crew from 23 countries, including over two dozen Americans.
• As of May 8, WHO has reported 8 cases (6 confirmed, 2 suspected) and 3 deaths; the CDC has classified it a "level 3" emergency response and stresses the risk to the American public remains "extremely low."
• Seven U.S. passengers have already returned home and are being monitored; none have shown symptoms. The Andes virus is unique as the only hantavirus known to spread person-to-person, though transmission requires close contact.
• The ship docked in Tenerife, Canary Islands on May 10 after being turned away from Cape Verde; passengers are now being repatriated to their home countries under health monitoring protocols.

Read the full article: CDC Monitors U.S. Passengers After Rare Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
